content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.24%, Bank Nifty -1.11% with PSU banks down -1.90% — broad market is mildly risk-off despite pockets of strength in Energy (+0.93%) and Metal (+0.72%). Book is already 41% deployed with 6 names showing positive unrealized P&L; priority is locking in gains via SL trails rather than chasing breakouts. Pending TATAPOWER limit at 443 is now stale (CMP 464 — won't fill), and pending HINDZINC/PHARMABEES need review.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24180
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1032.38,
      "new_target": 1095.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Currently +6.5% with SL at 1032.38 (already +4.9% above entry — locks in gain). Q4 FY26 strong (PAT +18%, GNPA <1%, dividend +60%). MACD bullish crossover, near 52w high zone. Current SL is already aggressive trail — no further tightening needed yet as ATR room required for swing continuation toward 1095. No-op? Actually current SL=1032.38 is unchanged — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL at 1032.38 already locks in ~5% gain on entry of 984. Target 1095 intact. Let it run — no MODIFY needed (would be no-op)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -1.6%, SL 119 is ~4.9% below CMP — within risk budget. Gold corrected 16% from ATH but long-term constructive (JPM $5000 target, INR weakness, Akshaya Tritiya demand). Hold SL as defensive hedge to equity book. No tightening yet — needs ATR room."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1425.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +1.8%, broke to fresh 52w high (1441). Q4 PAT +27%, double-digit volume growth — outlier print. Trail SL from 1420 to 1425 (+0.85% above entry — locks breakeven+). Target 1465 intact (Axis target 1640 longer term). Risk-reward still favorable."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 406.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +1.4%, near 52w high. Power sector strong (peak demand 256 GW record). SL 406 already at +0.4% above entry — holds. No-op MODIFY actually — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 406 already above entry 404.50. Q4 results May 15 catalyst ahead. Hold for target 425; will trail tighter if it crosses 414."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1740.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +1.3% on 5.3x volume. SL 1740 already above entry 1734 (locked breakeven+). Organon $11.75bn deal raises leverage to 2.3x — premium valuation, mixed broker view. No-op MODIFY — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1740 (above entry). Watching for either breakout above 1764 (trail SL up further) or fade below 1740 (auto-stopped breakeven+). No action needed now."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at -0.1%, SL 318 is ~0.6% below CMP. Defensive transmission utility, Q4 results May 19. Tight SL already provides protection. Hold for target 335."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 100,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 469.00,
      "stop_loss": 458.00,
      "target": 488.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Q4 FY26 PAT +11% beat (consensus expected -8.7% EBITDA). Final dividend Rs 5.25, total FY26 Rs 26.50/share = 5.6% yield. P/E 7.95 — cheap. MOFSL flags +12% upside. Position size ~5% of capital (Rs 46,900); SL distance 2.3% × 5% size = 0.12% portfolio risk. Risk-reward 1:1.7. Energy/PSU cluster check: NTPC + POWERGRID + GOLDBEES already held; COALINDIA tagged Metal sector — adds modest cluster but within 35% sector cap."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN limit order at 443 placed earlier is stale — CMP 464 has run away. Will CANCEL existing order separately. Not chasing into 52w high with NTPC + POWERGRID already in book (power cluster). Wait for pullback to 450-455 range."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Fresh 52w high on crude $106. Strong setup but adding another energy name (already NTPC+POWERGRID+RIL energy theme exposure) violates cluster discipline. Pass — watch for Q4 May 14 catalyst entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GLENMARK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up 3.78% to fresh 52w high after 37% rally in 2 months. Indore USFDA Warning Letter unresolved. Already extended — chasing breakout-to-52w-high while book is 41% deployed and SUNPHARMA already provides pharma exposure. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "RRKABEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up 6.4% on Q4 result eve (Apr 30). P/E 37.6 rich. Adani/Aditya Birla competitive entry overhang. Binary event 2 days away — won't enter ahead of result."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATACHEM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up 8.65% with no clear catalyst, on declining volume. Q3 net loss, soda ash prices weak globally. Speculative spike — pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "NAM-INDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +29% strong, but already up 4.8% intraday from gap. PNBHOUSING already provides Financial Services exposure. Watch for pullback to 1020-1030."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1032.38,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed to 1032.38 (+4.9% above entry). Locks in solid gain; let momentum carry to 1095 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position, hold SL at 119. Long-term gold thesis intact despite 16% pullback from ATH."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1425.00,
      "reasoning": "Trailed SL from 1420 to 1425 (+0.85% above entry). Fresh 52w high, Q4 outlier print, momentum intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 406.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at 406 already above 404.50 entry. Q4 May 15 catalyst ahead — let it work toward 425."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1740.00,
      "reasoning": "SL above entry, locked breakeven+. Will trail tighter on break above 1764 today."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 318.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 318 tight at 0.6% below CMP. Hold for May 19 Q4 catalyst, target 335."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "TATAPOWER existing OPEN limit at 443 is stale (CMP 464) — flagged for cancellation in next cycle if not done by execution layer. ONGC, GLENMARK await pullback or post-result entry. RRKABEL Q4 on Apr 30 — re-evaluate post-print. NAM-INDIA watch 1020-1030 zone for re-entry.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at 41% deployed with +0.17% session P&L; 5-day rolling stats are poor (15% win rate, 0.4x profit factor) — disposition is risk-off, prioritize trailing SLs over new adds. Adding only one new name (COALINDIA) at modest size due to clean Q4 beat + dividend yield. Power/Energy cluster (NTPC+POWERGRID+GOLDBEES+COALINDIA) needs monitoring — if I add ONGC or TATAPOWER, must trim one. Pending HINDZINC@612 and PHARMABEES@23.65 limits should be reviewed for cancellation if stale at next tick."
}
